channel.title: Trade on Koios.News
channel.description: Recent content in Trade on Koios.News

item.title: Thailand Rice Export Ban Signals the Fracturing of Global Food Security
item.description: Thailand’s rice export ban due to historic drought is triggering global price spikes and exposing the fragility of our food systems. This collapse in rice trade reflects a deeper crisis: climate volatility is unraveling global agriculture. The illusion of stable food supply chains is breaking—one drought, one policy, at a time.
